_comment: Merge this fragment into ~/.claude.json under .mcpServers. The peer-agent talks stdio MCP to Claude Code and connects to the local relay over HTTP. The `command` points to a wrapper that auto-locates node (covers nvm hosts where Claude Code's MCP execvp sees no node on PATH); the wrapper execs the sibling dist/index.js. After merging, start a CC session with --dangerously-load-development-channels server:hangar-bridge-peer-agent and run /mcp to verify.
